_note: SELF-HOST repurposing of the RE-RANK 08 schema (D21): each entry = one remaining PROMPT-BUILD/CR, not a product slice. done_sentinel = the disk path whose presence+validity == that build shipped (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state key; D14/D20 analog). roadmap_version 4 = CR-002 re-rank (aprd v4->v5, deterministic-machine). SCOPED TO THIS CR's wave (operator call 2026-06-11): completed[] + remaining_sequence carry ONLY the W0-W8 deterministic-spine wave. Prior waves (greenfield 10, bugfix 8) are delivered; their done-state lives on disk (sentinels under _fixtures/greenfield-* + _fixtures/brownfield-bugfix/), NOT re-listed here (disk is source of truth, D20 — this ledger is informational, not the truth the loop derives from). W0-CANON-CR = THIS intake (CR-002 + aprd.v5 + ADRs 0024-0027/D24-D27 extending D22 + skeleton.lock v5 canon CR + all re-signed locks); shipped, so derived frontier = W1-SCHEMA-REGISTRY. Compound sentinels (the full '+ selftest green' bars from directive §6) summarized per entry in rationale; the single done_sentinel path is the frontier key, the both-directions selftest is the gate the drain loop enforces. Contracts before consumers, code before prompt-edits (W6), orchestrator swap last among consumers (W7); re-run harmless (D20).

completed.name: deterministic-machine canon CR (intake)
completed.unit: .aprd/change-requests/CR-002.md + aprd.v5 + ADRs 0024-0027 + skeleton.lock v5 + all re-signed locks

remaining_sequence.name: schema-registry + validate.mjs + selftest
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: schemas/schemas.lock + tools/det/validate.mjs + both-directions selftest green (reference conforms; planted bad-shape fails). Externalizes every output schema (R9/D24); validator enforces conformance (R10).

remaining_sequence.name: io-manifest + resolve.mjs + selftest
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: io/io.lock + tools/io/resolve.mjs + both-directions selftest green (right state->right set; planted-wrong-state caught). Read-graph code-owned (R11/D25); prompts declare no inputs.

remaining_sequence.name: graph-lint: gen contracts.json, PR2 check
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: graph-lint.mjs green + generated contracts.json matches frozen .hld/skeleton/contracts.json. PR2 auto-checked by registry-id equality (R14); chain generated not hand-written.

remaining_sequence.name: det/ compute modules + selftests
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: all 6 modules + per-module both-directions selftests. verdict-from-count / route-from-axes / topo-sort / monotonic-id / set-bijection / mechanical-prefill computed by code (R12/D26).

remaining_sequence.name: Tier-1 emitters; retire those prompts
remaining_sequence.unit: tools/det/emit/*.mjs + Tier-1 prompts retired (sentinel + components.json note kept)
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: tools/det/emit/*.mjs (baseline-map, build-plan, derive-tests, verify-output, ...) emitter both-directions vs _fixtures + Tier-1 prompts retired (R13/D26/D27). Role keeps sentinel + components.json ownership note (D1).

remaining_sequence.name: re-author 04-build prompts (drop schema+inputs)
remaining_sequence.rationale: Discriminator: 04-build prompts carry NO inputs: block + NO ## Output schema section (skeleton v5); outputs[].schema = registry id. Verify clean-room both-directions; VALUE parity vs pre-CR golden (regression-guard). Biggest payoff (26-30 input lines each).

remaining_sequence.name: re-author 03/02/01/00 prompts, per phase
remaining_sequence.rationale: Per-phase, same bar as W6-04build: no inputs:/schema block, outputs[].schema id, clean-room both-directions, VALUE parity. One self-slice pass per phase.

remaining_sequence.name: orchestrator STEP-4.1 swap: resolve+prefill+compute
remaining_sequence.rationale: Discriminator: STEP-4.1 calls resolve(role,state) + prefill + compute + validate around the LLM fill (replaces parse-frontmatter). Gate = full self-host loop drains _fixtures/ clean e2e (regression-guard). Lands LAST among consumers (code + prompts proven first).

remaining_sequence.name: pack gate: wire all selftests, re-skin, ship
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: pack.mjs runs all selftests (validator + resolver + graph-lint + det modules + emitters + economy-lint) green; dist/adp-v<ver>.tgz ships. No tarball if any selftest mis-proves.

coverage.scope_note: Scoped to the CR-002 deterministic-machine wave only. Prior delivered waves (greenfield, bugfix) are not tracked here; their done-state is on disk (D20).
